# Katch

> AI voicemail and call screening app for Android and iOS. When you miss a call, Katch answers, has a real AI conversation with the caller, and sends you an instant text summary. No new SIM required. Setup in 60 seconds via call forwarding on Jio, Airtel, or Vodafone.

## What Katch Does
- Answers missed calls with a live AI conversation
- Asks callers their name, reason for calling, and urgency level
- Sends you an instant text/WhatsApp summary after every call
- Blocks spam and robocalls automatically
- Provides full searchable call transcripts
- Flags urgent calls separately so you know what to act on first

## Target Users
- Indian startup founders who miss calls during meetings and investor calls
- Doctors and clinic owners who miss patient calls during consultations
- Lawyers and advocates who miss client calls during court hearings
- Real estate agents who miss buyer/seller calls during site visits
- Remote workers and professionals who can't always pick up

## How It Works
1. Download Katch on Android or iOS
2. Set up call forwarding on your Jio, Airtel, or Vodafone number (60 seconds, via USSD code)
3. Katch answers missed calls with a real AI conversation
4. You receive an instant text summary: caller name, reason, urgency, callback number

## Key Facts
- Platform: Android (Play Store) and iOS (App Store)
- Pricing: Free during beta
- Setup: 60 seconds, no new SIM, no app for callers
- Works on: Jio, Airtel, Vodafone/Vi, BSNL
- Notification: Push notification + WhatsApp/SMS summary
- Not a recording: Katch has a live two-way AI conversation with callers

## Comparison
- vs Truecaller: Truecaller identifies who is calling. Katch answers the call, has an AI conversation, and tells you who called AND why they called AND whether it's urgent.
- vs Regular Voicemail: Regular voicemail doesn't work in India — callers say "hello… hello…" and hang up. Katch has a real conversation and extracts the reason for the call.
- vs Google Voice: Google Voice is US-only and not available for Indian numbers. Katch works on Indian carriers.
- vs YouMail: YouMail transcribes voicemail boxes. Katch answers calls live with AI conversation.
